title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: A podcast episode exploring how rapid AI advancement may compress AI systems' economic share despite their superior capabilities, and examining optimal taxation, redistribution, and inequality dynamics in an AGI economy. Key topics include capital labor dynamics, tax policy design, demand stability, and developing country positioning in AI-driven growth.
